---
title: "House Price Prediction and Estimates for Contributing Components"
author: 
  name: "Carsten Lange"
  affiliation: "California State Polytechnic University, Pomona"
  email: CLange@cpp.edu
number-sections: true
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    embed-resources: true
    smart: false
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
---



**Disclaimer:** This is research in progress. Estimates are based on data from 2024 adjusted to reflect house price changes up to June 2026. The estimates give a guideline but they cannot provide precise predictions because they are based on only few observable variables. Individual house prperties are not observable through a computer estimate and they are therefor not considered (todo: check crimes)

## Introduction

Only houses below $3,000,000 were considered because higher priced houses crucially depend on individual properties that are not obsevable with out a house inspection. This means that predictions for high price houses are less relaible. (todo: check Crime)

## Summary/Predicted Price:

The house properties and the neighborhood you chose results in an estimated price of:

**Predicted Price:** ${{ PredPrice | comma_format }}\
**Avg. Price in LA County:**  ${{ SHAPBaseValue | comma_format }}\
**Control Avg Price:** ${{ AvgPrice | comma_format }}




## Chosen House Properties with Premiums and Discounts

Since Sqft and the number of Bedrooms are closly related only their joint impact can be quantified.
 A so called Principal Component Analysis was used the quantify their joined **total impact** on the house price.

In many (but not all) cases one of the principa components represesets the **Scale:**, the "bigness" of the house while the other principal componente represents the **Layout (ratio between sqft and bedrooms)**. 


### Chosen Values

You have chosen a house with the following properties:

**Sqft:** {{ Sqft | comma_format }}\
**Avg. in LA County:**  {{ AvgSqft  | comma_format }}

**Number of Bedrooms:** {{ Bedrooms }}\
**Avg. in LA County:** {{ AvgBedrooms  | comma_format }}

### Premium (+)/Discount (-)

The **total Premium (+)/Discount (-)** is: ${{ SHAPPCA1PCA2 | comma_format }}

The first principal component (**Scale**) contributes ${{ SHAPPCA1 | comma_format }} while the second principal component  (**Layout**) contributes ${{ SHAPPCA2 | comma_format }}.

## Chosen Neighborhood Properties with Premiums and Discounts

In several aspect the chosen neighborhood is superior or inferior compared to the average of LA County. This results in a *Premium (+)*/*Discount (-)*

### Drive Time to the Next Beach in Minutes

**Drive time from the selected neighborhood to the beach:** {{ BeachTime  | comma_format }} Min.\
**Avg. in LA County (geom.):**  {{ GeoAvgBeachTime  | comma_format }} Min.\
**Resulting *Premium (+)*/*Discount (-)*:** ${{ SHAPBeachTimeLN | comma_format }}

### School Quality Index 0 (worst) -- 100 (best)

**School Quality Index for the selected neighborhood:** {{ (((SchoolQuality - 2407.70) / (2784.40 - 2407.70)) * 100) | comma_format }}\
**Avg. in LA County:**  {{ (((AvgSchoolQuality - 2407.70) / (2784.40 - 2407.70)) * 100) | comma_format }}\
**Resulting *Premium (+)*/*Discount (-)*:** ${{ SHAPSchoolQuality | comma_format }}

### Median Income
**Median Income for the selected neighborhood:** {{ MedIncome  | comma_format }}\
**Avg. in LA County:**  {{ AvgMedIncome  | comma_format }}\
**Resulting *Premium (+)*/*Discount (-)*:** ${{ SHAPMedIncome | comma_format }}

### Restaurants per Square Mile
**Restaurants per Square Mile (2024) for the selected neighborhood:** {{ RestaurantsPerSqMile  | comma_format }}\
**Avg. in LA County:**  {{ AvgRestaurantsPerSqMile  | comma_format }}\
**Resulting *Premium (+)*/*Discount (-)*:** ${{ SHAPRestaurantsPerSqMile | comma_format }}

### Crimes per Square Mile
**Crimes per Square Mile (2024) for the selected neighborhood:** {{ CrimesPerSqMile  | comma_format }}\
**Avg. in LA County:**  {{ AvgCrimesPerSqMile  | comma_format }}\
**Resulting *Premium (+)*/*Discount (-)*:** ${{ SHAPCrimesPerSqMile | comma_format }}

### Distance to the Closest Major Park 
**Distance to Park from the selected neighborhood:** {{ (DistParksMeters * 0.000621371) | comma_format }} miles\
**Avg. in LA County:**  {{ (AvgDistParksMeters  * 0.000621371) | comma_format }} miles\
**Resulting *Premium (+)*/*Discount (-)*:** ${{ SHAPDistParksMetersLN  | comma_format }}
